title: IBDP Math Teachers
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We are looking for highly passionate and responsible teachers to join our learning centre as IBDP Maths teachers. The successful candidate shall be tasked to deliver lessons in an engaging and dynamic manner, based on our curriculum and pedagogy, as well as establish relationships with our students to inspire loyalty and learning progress.

  • 40 hour work-week, with 2 off days a week (1 week-day and 1 weekend).
  • Small class size: 1 to 1~5.
  • Teaching materials provided.
  • Bonus structure even for teachers!

Responsibilities:

  • Execute lesson plans for IBDP or IGCSE level Math programmes.
  • Develop lesson materials and provide feedback to help students achieve visible improvement in academic results.
  • Engage students and help them realise their potential.
  • Assist in curriculum development and review of academic curriculums.
  • The setting of examination/assessment papers and assignments (question papers, resit papers and answer keys).
  • Invigilate, mark and record exams/assessments results.
  • Will be assigned moderation duties for other modules.

Requirements:

  • Experience in teaching Maths at IBDP and IGCSE levels.
  • Familiar with International Baccalaureate curriculum.
  • Bachelor’s degree (preferably major in related disciplines).
  • Excellent interpersonal, communication, presentation and organisational skills.
  • Highly motivated, good working attitude and strong sense of responsibility.
  • At least two years of experience in teaching related subjects.
  • Experience in teaching in a multilingual environment and academic assessment.
  • Able to conduct online lessons using Zoom etc, and familiar with software applications and productivity tools.

We offer an attractive package with excellent employee bene!ts, conducive working environment and career growth potential. Remuneration and benefits will commensurate with qualifications and experience.

Interested candidates are invited to apply online stating your current and expected salary and date of availability.

postedCompany.description:
7+ Academy is one of the top tutoring service focussed on the IGCSE and IBDP curricula. At 7+ Academy, we have proudly established ourselves as a beacon of academic excellence, guiding students to triumphs that extend beyond the confines of traditional education. Our proven track record stands as a testament to our commitment to nurturing young minds and cultivating a passion for learning. 

Parents who choose 7+ Academy embark on a journey where academic success is not just a goal but a tangible outcome. The 7+ management and academic team is comprised of outstanding individuals educated in some of the best universities in the world. Excellence breeds excellence!!!
